# GitHub Issue Templates

This directory contains templates for creating new issues.

## Available Templates

### 🐛 Bug Report
For reporting bugs or issues with the software.

**Use when:**
- Something isn't working as expected
- You found an error
- The application crashes

### ✨ Feature Request
For suggesting new features or enhancements.

**Use when:**
- You have an idea for a new feature
- You want to improve existing functionality
- You have a suggestion for the roadmap

## Quick Links

- [Bug Report Template](./bug_report.md)
- [Feature Request Template](./feature_request.md)
